In 2020 Transport for NSW approached Q-CTRL with an interest in understanding how they – as an organisation with heavy computational challenges – could put quantum computing to work for them.
Q-CTRL took on the challenge and has focused on getting Transport for NSW quantum ready via a combination of quantum professional services and quantum control infrastructure software development.

interaction_phrase: building a custom software package for Transport for NSW
occurrence_sentence: Having demonstrated a real quantum advantage in large-scale network optimisation looks to be possible, Q-CTRL is currently building a custom software package for Transport for NSW.

occurrence_sentence: The Australian Government is establishing the $15 billion National Reconstruction Fund (NRF) to support, diversify and transform Australia's industry.
